items.title: aja monet, “the color of rain”
items.summary: The blues poet forges a pan-genre framework as multidimensional as the concepts powering her poetic flow. Read full story on the Bandcamp Daily.

items.title: Sonny Rollins, Jazz Luminary and Saxophone Legend, Dies at 95
items.summary: The tenor player was equally heralded onstage by his peers as he was offstage with prestigious awards
